market_structure.notes: Price resting on a structural support zone (blue rectangle) minutes before an 08:30 data print. Gold is lagging PL and SI.

reasons: Trading directly into an 08:30 data print is gambling due to erratic algorithmic wicks.
A 'stop run' (sweep below 4930) is highly probable before any real move.
Waiting for a 1-minute close above 4930 post-news validates the institutional defense of the level.
trades.raw_context_excerpt: RÈGLE : NE CLIQUE PAS AVANT 08H31. Laisse l'algo de news passer... Si à 08h32 le prix est toujours au-dessus de 4930 : ACHAT.
trades.notes: Disciplined approach to high-impact economic data releases, prioritizing survival over catching the exact bottom tick.

market_structure.notes: Price bounced sharply from the Blue MA (4819) and was pressing against resistance (4835-4838) right before the print.

reasons: If the news is 'Bad' for the US economy (Good for Gold), it acts as the catalyst to smash the immediate resistance.
A breakout above the local bounce high confirms algorithmic buying volume.
Avoiding the exact minute of the print protects against spread widening.
trades.raw_context_excerpt: Si le chiffre est mauvais pour le Dollar. L'Or va exploser à la hausse. Trigger : Cassure des 4843 (Sommet du rebond). Target : 4860.
trades.notes: Event-driven technical breakout strategy based on fundamental data interpretation.

market_structure.notes: 4 minutes before US Open. Price had dropped from 4890 to test support at 4850, leaving a long lower wick.

reasons: The open induces massive two-way volatility designed to hunt stops.
Price is sandwiched between confirmed support (4850) and immediate resistance (Red MA at 4865).
Awaiting confirmation of support holding (Double Bottom) or resistance breaking (4870) provides a much safer entry.
trades.raw_context_excerpt: Ne fais rien à 09h30 pile. Laisse les algos se battre. Cherche à acheter uniquement si le support des 4850 est testé et validé, ou si on casse 4870.
trades.notes: Classic opening bell survival strategy: sit on hands and wait for the dust to settle before choosing a side.

market_structure.notes: Gold up +3.39% but stalling between 4750 (Red MA support) and 4756 (local ceiling) during low-volume hours.

reasons: The Red MA is actively supporting the price, maintaining the bullish structure.
Volume is dead, making breakouts unlikely until the afternoon session resumes.
Moving the stop loss to breakeven (below the Blue MA at 4738) secures the trade while allowing for a potential afternoon continuation run.
trades.raw_context_excerpt: Si tu es déjà Long : Garde ta position. Mets ton stop sous la ligne bleue (4738). Si tu es Cash : Ne fais rien tant qu'on est entre 4750 et 4756.
trades.notes: Demonstrates proper trade management during low-liquidity periods, avoiding overtrading.
